cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure this out. So the question is about determining the possible time Andrew went to the clothing store, based on the various alibis from different people. Let me break down the information step by step. First, let's list out all the given time intervals when Andrew was seen doing different activities by others. 1. Andrew woke up at 5 am. That's the starting point. 2. William saw Andrew playing tennis from 5am to 6am. So from 5 to 6, Andrew was at the tennis court. 3. Jessica saw him buying lunch at the deli from 6am to 9am. So after tennis, he was at the deli from 6 to 9. 4. Tiffany saw him taking photos near the Leaning Tower of Pisa from 9am to 11am. So from 9 to 11, he was in Pisa. 5. John saw Andrew waiting at the train station from 11am to 5pm. That's a long time, from 11 AM to 5 PM. 6. Sarah saw him reading at the library from 6pm to 9pm. So after 5 PM, he's at the library until 9 PM. 7. The clothing store was closed after 9 PM. So Andrew had to go there before that. Now, the task is to find the time window during which Andrew wasn't accounted for by any of these activities. The clothing store visit must have happened during a time when none of the people mentioned saw him doing something else. Let me map out the timeline: - 5am - 6am: Tennis (William) - 6am - 9am: Deli (Jessica) - 9am - 11am: Pisa (Tiffany) - 11am - 5pm: Train station (John) - 5pm - 9pm: Library (Sarah) - The store is closed after 9pm. Let's check for gaps between these intervals where Andrew could have gone to the clothing store. From 5am to 6am: Busy with tennis. From 6am to 9am: At the deli. From 9am to 11am: In Pisa. From 11am to 5pm: At the train station. From 5pm to 9pm: At the library. After 9pm: Store closed. So the intervals when Andrew is busy are: 5am to 9am (tennis + deli) 9am to 11am (Pisa) 11am to 5pm (train station) 5pm to 9pm (library) Now, let's look for any time gaps between these intervals. Between 5am and 6am: busy Between 6am and 9am: busy At 9am, he starts going to Pisa until 11am. So from 9am to 11am: busy. Therefore, there's no gap between 9am and 11am.
